calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Establish Fact, Date And Place Of Marriage
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Osaiaso Vaioleti Tonga Kioa in propria persona.
Aloisia Taumua Muasika in propria persona.

The court noted that box 5-a of the declaration was not checked and questions whether the parties obtained a marriage license. Mr. Kioa stated that they obtained a license, but he was told that the date of marriage expired. Mr. Kioa also spoke of where the marriage took place, presented an announcement of their wedding with a date July 22, 2022, presented photos of them in their wedding outfits and them dancing, and stated that he did not ask the minister to amend the license because Los Angeles County told them this was their only option. The court is satisfied with the documents provided which proves that the wedding occurred on July 22, 2022. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
